title: pvp+
description: this modpack is directed at improving pvp and visuals,
body: # ⚔️ PvP+ > A comprehensive modpack focused on maximizing your PvP performance, upgrading visuals, and pushing your frame rate to the limit. --- ### 🚀 Unmatched Optimization This modpack isn't just about combat—it outperforms many dedicated optimization packs. In tests running on maximum settings with a 32-chunk render distance, **PvP+ doubled the frame rate**, delivering a massive **188 FPS increase**. **With PvP+ ON:** ![Modpack ON](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcd6460fbe8d34144f359179f1d59cca0b9a9d23.png) **With PvP+ OFF:** ![Modpack OFF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b4147a2e6cdefa4c4d14beb4f8613b243fefcc9_0.webp) --- ### 🎯 Combat & Visual Upgrades Built entirely from carefully selected mods and resource packs to keep your game lean and responsive: * **Smart Swapping:** Quickly swap between your Totem, Shield, and Elytra during combat. * **Enhanced Visuals:** Upgraded graphics that look great without tanking your performance. --- ### ⚠️ Important Warnings & Setup **Server Rules:** Be extremely careful when playing on public multiplayer servers. Certain mods included in this modpack (such as **Item Scroller**) may be banned or restricted by server rules. Always verify the server's allowed mods list before joining to avoid getting banned. **Key Bindings:** Controls are **not pre-configured**. Since every player has different preferences, you must set up your own keybinds. Configure them through the standard settings and the Mod Menu before jumping into a fight. --- ### 🔄 Long-Term Support PvP+ is built to last. The modpack will receive continuous updates and is guaranteed to be ported to newer Minecraft versions as major global updates are released. ---
